name: legal-nda-triage
description: Rapid NDA pre-screen: standard approval / counsel review / full review — not legal advice

steps.text: Provide NDA text via chat or knowledge/legal/. Category + flags only; attorney decides signature.

steps.prompt:
Run skill legal-playbook procedure **triage-nda** using knowledge/legal/playbook.md.
If NDA text is missing, request mutual/one-way form text.
Output:
1) Primary category: Standard approval path | Counsel review | Full review
2) Checklist gates with GREEN/YELLOW/RED
3) Three concrete next steps
4) Counsel gate
Not legal advice. Do not invent enforceability conclusions.

steps.action: Acknowledge NDA triage is not approval to sign
steps.detail: Human confirms counsel reviews before execution.
